authoritative_source.authority_status: official MedDRA site reachable; SPA support/subscription routes recorded; licensed payload access not attempted
authoritative_source.observed_release: not_pinned; no MedDRA release payloads downloaded
authoritative_source.version_pinning_strategy: pin by MedDRA release version, release date, language pack, distribution channel, license/subscription terms, file checksums, and local-only manifest after terms review

artifact_contract.freshness_rule: refresh probe metadata when MedDRA version, release cadence, subscription terms, language-pack scope, official routes, checksums, or payload policy changes

fail_fast_probe_design.record_scope: one MedDRA source governance record only; no LLT, PT, HLT, HLGT, SOC, SMQ, language-pack, or hierarchy rows until license and redistribution terms are cleared
required_outputs: candidate comparison or crosswalk shell when applicable
success_criteria: MedDRA authority, subscription gate, release path, and license state recorded
payload handling path classified as commit-safe or local-only
review handoff remains candidate-only and human-review-required

human_review_and_llm_policy.llm_output_allowed: metadata and review-assistance only until MedDRA subscription/license, language-pack, and redistribution terms are cleared

telemetry.source_version: official MedDRA site observed; release payload and version not downloaded
telemetry.validation_command: pixi run build-ontology-network; pixi run validate-conductor; pixi run validate-ontology-network; pixi run validate-ontology-network-artifacts; pixi run test-conductor-validation; git diff --check
open_blockers: MSSO/ICH release and redistribution terms review required
regulatory adverse-event semantics require human review before HPO translation use
